description: Composition Black wind cheater made of 100% polyester, has a mock neck with a zippered placket, one zippered pocket and embroidered branding on the left chest and two zippered pockets on the side Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Trust outdoors experts wildcraft to provide great simple designs which will keep you toasty warm. Extremely lightweight due to the the fleece & ndash which, by the way, is recycled so your eco-conscience can rest at ease. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 33''Please note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
